title: oberna behen subsp. maritima
intro: Oberna behen subsp. maritima, also known as sea oberna, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Oberna behen subsp. maritima is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, coughs, and respiratory problems.
